title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">✅</font> Grounds discussions in tangible re
content:
✅ Grounds discussions in tangible reality while also making literature feel alive.
✅ Encourages students to think in terms of setting and its influence on perception.
✅ Creates an immersive framework where each week feels like an unfolding story.

📜 2. Writing Tips: No Standalone Facts—Always Lead to Discussion

📜 Each week’s writing tip now includes an open-ended question.

Example: Week 7 – Stream-of-Consciousness & the Fragmentation of Thought

📜 “Writing Tip: Good stream-of-consciousness doesn’t just mimic thought—it selects and distills thought into something intentional. Look at how Virginia Woolf does this in Mrs. Dalloway: ‘What a lark! What a plunge!’ Short, explosive phrases create immediacy.”

📢 Discussion Question: How does economy of language reflect emotion? Can fewer words create more impact? Think of an example where brevity heightened tension or meaning.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 141 (chunk 141/555)
